name: network_api_sdk
desc: Public entry point for the network_api_sdk package.

name: AuthManager
desc: Manages token caching, persistence, and single-flight refreshes.

name: AuthManager.new
desc: Creates an authentication manager backed by _store.

name: clear
desc: Clears the in-memory cache and the underlying TokenStore.

name: load
desc: Loads tokens from memory or storage.

name: refreshSingleFlight
desc: Runs a refresh operation while ensuring only one refresh is in flight.

name: save
desc: Saves tokens to memory and persistent storage.

name: AuthOptions
desc: Configures the SDK's built-in authentication endpoints and token mapping.

name: AuthOptions.new
desc: Creates authentication settings for login and refresh.

name: accessTokenPath
desc: Dot-separated path to the access token inside successful response data.

name: loginEndpoint
desc: The endpoint used by the built-in login helper.

name: refreshEndpoint
desc: The endpoint used by the built-in refresh helper.

name: refreshRequestKey
desc: The request body key used when sending the refresh token.

name: refreshTokenPath
desc: Dot-separated path to the refresh token inside successful response data.

name: BodyFile
desc: Represents one multipart file field.

name: BodyFile.new
desc: Creates a multipart file payload.

name: bytes
desc: Raw file contents.

name: contentType
desc: Optional MIME type for multipart uploads.

name: filename
desc: File name sent to the server.

name: BodyType
desc: Declares how a RequestBody should be encoded by an HTTP client.

name: values
desc: A constant List of the values in this enum, in order of their declaration.

name: BytesJsonMode
desc: Controls how the SDK normalizes transport responses.

name: values
desc: A constant List of the values in this enum, in order of their declaration.

name: CacheStore
desc: Stores cached response payloads for offline GET fallbacks.

name: clear
desc: Removes all cached values.

name: get
desc: Retrieves a previously cached value for key.

name: put
desc: Saves value under key.

name: remove
desc: Removes the cached value for key.

name: DioHttpClient
desc: Default HttpClient implementation backed by package:dio.

name: DioHttpClient.new
desc: Creates a Dio-backed client for Sdk.

name: send
desc: Sends request through Dio and returns a flattened HttpResponse.

name: ErrorType
desc: Categorizes SDK errors.

name: values
desc: A constant List of the values in this enum, in order of their declaration.

name: FileCacheStore
desc: File-backed CacheStore implementation.

name: FileCacheStore.new
desc: Creates a cache store backed by _file.

name: clear
desc: Clears the cache file.

name: get
desc: Reads the cached value for key.

name: put
desc: Saves value under key and rewrites the backing file.

name: remove
desc: Removes key from the cache file.

name: FileQueueStore
desc: File-backed QueueStore that persists queued requests as JSON.

name: FileQueueStore.new
desc: Creates a queue store backed by file.

name: clear
desc: Clears the queue and persists the empty state.

name: enqueue
desc: Appends r to the queue and persists the whole file.

name: file
desc: The JSON file used to persist the queue.

name: peekAll
desc: Returns an immutable snapshot of the queue.

name: peekAllSync
desc: Returns an immutable snapshot of the queue synchronously.

name: removeAt
desc: Removes the queued item at index and persists the change.

name: HttpClient
desc: Transport abstraction used by the SDK.

name: send
desc: Sends request and returns the raw transport response.

name: HttpRequest
desc: Raw transport request sent through an HttpClient.

name: HttpRequest.new
desc: Creates a transport request.

name: body
desc: Request payload description.

name: copyWith
desc: Returns a copy of this request with selected fields replaced.

name: endpoint
desc: Endpoint path relative to the configured base URL.

name: headers
desc: Request headers.

name: method
desc: HTTP method, such as GET or POST.

name: query
desc: Query parameters appended to the request URL.

name: responseType
desc: Response type hint for the underlying HTTP client.

name: HttpResponse
desc: Raw transport response returned by an HttpClient.

name: HttpResponse.new
desc: Creates a transport response.

name: copyWith
desc: Returns a copy of this response with selected fields replaced.

name: data
desc: Raw response payload before SDK contract evaluation.

name: headers
desc: Response headers flattened into a string map.

name: statusCode
desc: HTTP status code returned by the transport.

name: IsBodySuccess
desc: Evaluates whether a decoded response body represents success.

name: MemoryCacheStore
desc: In-memory CacheStore implementation.

name: clear
desc: Clears all in-memory values.

name: get
desc: Reads a value from memory.

name: put
desc: Saves value under key in memory.

name: remove
desc: Removes a value from memory.

name: MemoryQueueStore
desc: In-memory QueueStore implementation.

name: clear
desc: Clears the queue.

name: enqueue
desc: Adds a request to the in-memory queue.

name: peekAll
desc: Returns an immutable snapshot of the queue.

name: peekAllSync
desc: Returns an immutable snapshot of the queue synchronously.

name: removeAt
desc: Removes the item at index.

name: OutputOptions
desc: Creates output normalization settings for the SDK.

name: OutputOptions.jsonOnly
desc: Creates the package's standard JSON-friendly output configuration.

name: OutputOptions.new
desc: Creates a new set of output options.

name: bytesMode
desc: Preferred handling for byte responses.

name: jsonOnly
desc: Whether responses should be constrained to JSON-friendly values.

name: tryParseJsonText
desc: Whether string responses that look like JSON should be decoded.

name: QueueStore
desc: Persists write requests that should be flushed later.

name: clear
desc: Clears the queue.

name: enqueue
desc: Adds r to the end of the queue.

name: peekAll
desc: Returns the current queued requests without removing them.

name: removeAt
desc: Removes the queued item at index.

name: QueuedRequest
desc: Wraps an HttpRequest for offline queue persistence.

name: QueuedRequest.new
desc: Creates a queued request wrapper.

name: request
desc: The queued transport request.

name: RefreshExecutor
desc: Executes a token refresh using the current stored TokenPair.

name: RequestBody
desc: Represents a request payload sent through the SDK call API.

name: RequestBody.bytes
desc: Creates a raw byte body.

name: RequestBody.formUrlEncoded
desc: Creates an application/x-www-form-urlencoded style body description.

name: RequestBody.json
desc: Creates a JSON body.

name: RequestBody.multipart
desc: Creates a multipart body with optional fields and files.

name: RequestBody.none
desc: Creates an empty request body.

name: RequestBody.text
desc: Creates a plain-text body.

name: contentType
desc: Optional content type metadata for text or byte payloads.

name: fields
desc: Form fields used for multipart requests.

name: files
desc: Multipart files keyed by field name.

name: type
desc: The body encoding requested by the caller.

name: value
desc: The primary body value for non-multipart requests.

name: ResponseSource
desc: Describes where a response was produced from.

name: values
desc: A constant List of the values in this enum, in order of their declaration.

name: ResponseTypeHint
desc: Hints how the HTTP client should request the response payload.

name: values
desc: A constant List of the values in this enum, in order of their declaration.

name: Sdk
desc: Global SDK entry point.

name: auth
desc: Authentication API for login, refresh, and sign-out flows.

name: authManager
desc: Token manager used internally by auth and retry flows.

name: cache
desc: Cache store used for offline GET fallbacks.

name: call
desc: Request API for HTTP calls.

name: config
desc: Initialization settings used to build the SDK modules.

name: events
desc: Event hub for session lifecycle notifications.

name: http
desc: HTTP client used by the SDK.

name: init
desc: Initializes or replaces the global SDK singleton.

name: instance
desc: Returns the initialized SDK singleton.

name: interceptors
desc: Interceptor pipeline built from SdkConfig.interceptors.

name: queue
desc: Queue API used to flush queued requests.

name: queueStore
desc: Queue store used for offline write persistence.

name: resetForTest
desc: Resets the singleton for tests.

name: signOut
desc: Clears persisted authentication state.

name: SdkConfig
desc: Configures SDK initialization.

name: SdkConfig.new
desc: Creates SDK initialization settings.

name: auth
desc: Enables the built-in login and refresh helpers when provided.

name: baseUrl
desc: Base URL passed to the default DioHttpClient.

name: cacheStoreOverride
desc: Overrides the cache store used for offline GET fallbacks.

name: contract
desc: Contract used to evaluate backend success and extract response data.

name: httpOverride
desc: Overrides the built-in HTTP client.

name: interceptors
desc: Interceptors executed in registration order.

name: offlineQueueEnabled
desc: Additional queue feature flag for consumers and custom integrations.

name: output
desc: Output normalization settings applied to transport responses.

name: profile
desc: Runtime profile controlling offline cache and queue behavior.

name: queueStoreOverride
desc: Overrides the queue store used for offline write persistence.

name: tokenStoreOverride
desc: Overrides the token store used by the built-in authentication manager.

name: SdkContract
desc: Describes how the SDK should interpret a backend response contract.

name: SdkContract.auto
desc: Creates a common contract with optional success flag and error code checks.

name: SdkContract.new
desc: Creates an explicit response contract definition.

name: dataPath
desc: Dot-separated path used to extract the normalized response payload.

name: isBodySuccess
desc: Additional body-level success evaluation applied to JSON map responses.

name: messagePath
desc: Dot-separated path used to extract a response message.

name: successStatusCodes
desc: HTTP status codes that are considered transport-level success.

name: SdkError
desc: Describes an SDK failure in a transport-agnostic way.

name: SdkError.new
desc: Creates an SDK error value.

name: message
desc: Human-readable error message.

name: raw
desc: Raw error payload or response body, when preserved.

name: statusCode
desc: HTTP status code when one was available.

name: type
desc: The high-level category of failure.

name: SdkEvent
desc: SDK lifecycle events emitted through SdkEvents.

name: values
desc: A constant List of the values in this enum, in order of their declaration.

name: SdkEvents
desc: Broadcasts SDK lifecycle events to listeners.

name: dispose
desc: Closes the underlying stream controller.

name: emit
desc: Emits e to current listeners.

name: stream
desc: A broadcast stream of SdkEvent values.

name: SdkInterceptor
desc: Hook points that can observe or mutate SDK requests and responses.

name: SdkInterceptor.new
desc: Creates an interceptor.

name: onError
desc: Observes or replaces an error produced from a thrown exception path.

name: onRequest
desc: Observes or replaces the outgoing request before it is sent.

name: onResponse
desc: Observes or replaces the transport response after normalization.

name: SdkProfile
desc: Controls the SDK's built-in offline cache and request queue behavior.

name: SdkProfile.defaultSecure
desc: Creates a profile with offline features disabled.

name: SdkProfile.new
desc: Creates a runtime profile for offline and queueing behavior.

name: SdkProfile.offlineFirstSecure
desc: Creates a profile that enables offline caching and offline write queueing.

name: autoFlushOnInit
desc: Whether the queue should be flushed once during initialization.

name: autoFlushQueue
desc: Requests automatic queue flushing behavior.

name: flushInterval
desc: Optional interval for future auto-flush scheduling.

name: offlineEnabled
desc: Enables offline cache lookup for failed GET requests.

name: queueWritesWhenOffline
desc: Queues non-GET requests when a network failure occurs.

name: shouldFlushOnceOnInit
desc: Whether startup should trigger a one-time queue flush.

name: SdkResponse
desc: Represents the normalized result returned by the SDK request APIs.

name: SdkResponse.new
desc: Creates a normalized SDK response.

name: data
desc: Normalized response payload.

name: error
desc: Error details for unsuccessful responses.

name: message
desc: User-facing message extracted from the response contract when available.

name: meta
desc: Extra metadata attached by SDK features.

name: ok
desc: Whether the operation was successful according to HTTP and contract rules.

name: source
desc: Where the result came from.

name: statusCode
desc: HTTP status code when one was available.

name: SecureTokenStore
desc: Stores SDK tokens in flutter_secure_storage.

name: SecureTokenStore.new
desc: Creates a secure token store.

name: clear
desc: Removes all SDK token keys from secure storage.

name: read
desc: Reads tokens from secure storage.

name: save
desc: Persists both tokens and records the rememberMe flag.

name: TokenPair
desc: Holds the access and refresh tokens for an authenticated session.

name: TokenPair.new
desc: Creates a token pair.

name: accessToken
desc: Token attached to authenticated requests.

name: refreshToken
desc: Token used to obtain a new access token.

name: TokenStore
desc: Persists authentication tokens for the SDK.

name: clear
desc: Removes any stored session data.

name: read
desc: Loads the last saved token pair, or null if none exists.

name: save
desc: Persists tokens.
